sn45.19:1.1: At Paṭaliputta. "Friend Ānanda, it is said, ‘the holy life, the holy life.’ What now, friend, is the holy life and what is the final goal of the holy life?"
sn45.19:1.2: "Good, good, friend Bhadda! Your intelligence is excellent, friend Bhadda, your ingenuity is excellent, your inquiry is a good one. For you have asked me: ‘Friend Ānanda, it is said, "the holy life, the holy life." What now, friend, is the holy life and what is the final goal of the holy life?’"
sn45.19:1.4: "This Noble Eightfold Path, friend, is the holy life; that is, right view … right concentration. The destruction of lust, the destruction of hatred, the destruction of delusion: this, friend, is the final goal of the holy life."
